languages.text: {n}Глаза вивисектора загораются.{/n} "Потрясающе, Лорд-капитан. Освещение, инструментарий... Служители Алтаря-Темплума разбудили каждую священную машину и даровали нам курительные смеси, притупляющие боль! У нас будет меньше смертей от шока, все оперативные процедуры ускорятся... Наша работа выйдет на новый, непревзойденный уровень. Это лучшее, что случалось с Сектором Бионика за долгие десятилетия".

traits.locale_text: {n}Глаза вивисектора сверкают, он всплескивает окровавленными руками.{/n} "Потрясающе, Лорд-капитан. Освещение, инструментарий... Служители Алтаря-Темплума разбудили каждую машину и даровали нам нам целых две полных литании утоления боли! Это лучшее, что случалось с этим местом за долгие десятилетия".

languages.text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."

languages.text: {n}解剖師の目は興奮で輝いている.{/n} 「信じられない、艦長様。照明、器具…祭壇神殿のしもべたちはすべての聖なる機械を目覚めさせ、痛みを和らげる香料を授けてくれました。ショック死が減り、すべての処置が短時間で完了するでしょう…私たちの仕事は、かつてない新しいレベルに進みます。ここ何十年にもわたって、最も素晴らしい出来事ですね」
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to this place in many decades."

traits.locale_text: {n}解剖師の目は興奮で輝いている.{/n} 「信じられない、艦長様。照明、器具…祭壇神殿のしもべたちはすべての聖なる機械を目覚めさせ、痛みを和らげる香料を授けてくれました。ショック死が減り、すべての処置が短時間で完了するでしょう…私たちの仕事は、かつてない新しいレベルに進みます。ここ何十年にもわたって、最も素晴らしい出来事ですね。」

languages.text: {n}Dirikesimci'nin gözleri heyecanla parlıyor.{/n} "İnanılmaz Lord Kaptan. Işıklandırma, aletler... Altar-Templum'un hizmetkârları, her kutsal makineyi uyandırdı ve acıyı dindirmek için bize tütsü karışımları verdi! Şoktan ölenlerin sayısı azalacak, tüm prosedürler daha kısa sürede tamamlanacak... Çalışmalarımız, benzeri görülmemiş yeni bir seviyeye ilerleyecek. Bu, on yıllardır Sektör Biyonika'nın başına gelen en iyi şey."
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."

Altar-Templum'un hizmetkârları, her kutsal makineyi uyandırdı ve acıyı dindirmek için bize tütsü karışımları verdi! Şoktan ölenlerin sayısı azalacak, tüm prosedürler daha kısa sürede tamamlanacak... Çalışmalarımız, benzeri görülmemiş yeni bir seviyeye ilerleyecek. Bu, on yıllardır Sektör Biyonika'nın başına gelen en iyi şey."

languages.text: {n}Los ojos del vivisector relucen de entusiasmo.{/n} «Es increíble, Lord Capitán. La iluminación, el instrumental... ¡Los sirvientes del Altar-Templum han despertado a todas las máquinas sagradas y nos han entregado mezclas de incienso para aliviar el dolor! Tendremos menos muertes por shock y todos los procedimientos se completarán más rápido... Nuestro trabajo adquirirá un nivel sin precedentes. Es lo mejor que le ha ocurrido al Sector Bionica en muchas décadas».
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los ojos del vivisector relucen de entusiasmo.{/n} «Es increíble, Lord Capitán. La iluminación, el instrumental... ¡Los sirvientes del Altar-Templum han despertado a todas las máquinas sagradas y nos han entregado mezclas de incienso para aliviar el dolor! Tendremos menos muertes por shock y todos los procedimientos se completarán más rápido... Nuestro trabajo adquirirá un nivel sin precedentes. Es lo mejor que le ha ocurrido al Sector Bionica en muchas décadas».

languages.text: {n}解剖者的眼中闪烁着兴奋的光芒。{/n}“太不可思议了，舰长大人。这些照明、仪器……祭坛侍奉者唤醒了所有神圣机器，还赐予了我们能减轻疼痛的熏香合剂！休克死亡数将减少，所有手术的时间都会缩短……我们的工作会提升到一个前所未有的水平。这是仿生区几十年来最大的喜事。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."

traits.locale_text: {n}解剖者的眼中闪烁着兴奋的光芒。{/n}“太不可思议了，舰长大人。这些照明、仪器……祭坛侍奉者唤醒了所有神圣机器，还赐予了我们能减轻疼痛的熏香合剂！休克死亡数将减少，所有手术的时间都会缩短……我们的工作会提升到一个前所未有的水平。这是仿生区几十年来最大的喜事。”

languages.text: {n}Une lueur d'excitation brille dans les yeux du vivisecteur.{/n} « Il est incroyable, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. L'éclairage, les instruments... Les serviteurs d'Altar-Templum ont réveillé toutes les machines sacrées et nous ont donné des mélanges d'encens qui soulagent la douleur ! Nous perdrons moins de patients sous l'effet du choc, toutes les opérations seront réalisées plus rapidement... Notre travail atteindra bientôt un niveau sans précédent. C'est la meilleure chose qui soit arrivée au secteur Bionica depuis des décennies. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."

traits.locale_text: {n}Une lueur d'excitation brille dans les yeux du vivisecteur.{/n} « Il est incroyable, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. L'éclairage, les instruments... Les serviteurs d'Altar-Templum ont réveillé toutes les machines sacrées et nous ont donné des mélanges d'encens qui soulagent la douleur ! Nous perdrons moins de patients sous l'effet du choc, toutes les opérations seront réalisées plus rapidement... Notre travail atteindra bientôt un niveau sans précédent. C'est la meilleure chose qui soit arrivée au secteur Bionica depuis des décennies. »

languages.text: {n}Die Augen des Vivisektors strahlen aufgeregt.{/n} "Es ist unglaublich, Lord Captain! Das Licht, die Instrumentierung ... Die Diener von Altar-Templum haben alle heiligen Maschinen erweckt und uns Weihrauchmixturen gegen die Schmerzen gegeben. Wir werden weniger Tote durch Schock zu beklagen haben und alle Prozeduren werden in kürzerer Zeit abgeschlossen ... Unsere Arbeit wird ein nie da gewesenes Niveau erreichen. Das ist das Beste, was dem Sektor Bionica in vielen Jahrzehnten passiert ist."
languages.original_text: {n}The Vivisector's eyes shine with excitement.{/n} "It's incredible, Lord Captain. The lighting, the instrumentation... The servants of the Altar-Templum have awakened every sacred machine and granted us incense mixtures to dull pain! We will have fewer deaths from shock, all procedures will be completed in less time... Our work will advance to a new, unprecedented level. This is the best thing that has happened to the Sector Bionica in many decades."
